MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff GCFS, INCORPORATED'S Motion for Facts and Documents Deemed Admitted and for Attorney Fees is off calendar. On August 23, 2013, the parties entered into a stipulated judgment. Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
